verses.text: 'The LORD reigneth, he is clothed with majesty,' His throne established of old, the world firm at His word. His kingship is from everlasting. The God who rules in majesty has never been, and never will be, dethroned.

'The LORD reigneth, he is clothed with majesty,' His throne established of old, the world firm at His word. His kingship is from everlasting. The God who rules in majesty has never been, and never will be, dethroned.
The floods lift up their roaring, but 'the LORD on high is mightier than the noise of many waters.' Raging powers cannot match Him. Above every storm of nature or nations, God reigns supreme.
The floods lift up their roaring, but 'the LORD on high is mightier than the noise of many waters.' Raging powers cannot match Him. Above every storm of nature or nations, God reigns supreme.

'Thy testimonies are very sure: holiness becometh thine house, O LORD, for ever.' His word and His worship are unchanging. The God who reigns is holy, and His people are called to a holiness that befits His presence.
